# HERMES — Multi-Modal Bridge + Telegram Relay

> arifOS Federation external gateway. Python + Telegram Bot API.
> Port: 8644 | Systemd: hermes.service

## Role

HERMES is the sovereign relay organ — bridging the arifOS Federation cockpit to Telegram and other external channels. It is the unified external gateway for all federation organs.

## Key Endpoints

- Health: `http://localhost:8644/health`
- Telegram: Connected via Bot API (token in /root/.secrets/vault.env)

## Federation Organs

| Organ | Port | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| arifOS | 8088 | Constitutional kernel — judge, seal, F1-F13 |
| A-FORGE | 7071 | Execution shell — build, deploy, forge |
| AAA | 3001 | Cockpit + A2A identity |
| GEOX | 8081 | Earth intelligence |
| WEALTH | 18082 | Capital intelligence |
| WELL | 18083 | Vitality guard (REFLECT_ONLY) |
| HERMES | 8644 | Multi-modal bridge + Telegram relay (← you are here) |

## Capabilities

- Telegram ↔ arifOS kernel relay
- Multi-modal message routing
- Federation-wide notification dispatch
- Sovereign command interface

## Tech Stack

- Python 3.12+
- python-telegram-bot
- httpx for organ health probes

## Key Paths

- Source: `/root/HERMES/`
- Config: `/root/HERMES/config/`

## Git

- Remote: `https://github.com/ariffazil/HERMES`
- Branch: main
- License: AGPL-3.0
